heading: Classification training program
label: 3344 Classification training program

children.label: A
children.text: the guidance established under subparagraph (G) of , as added by section 5(a)(3), regarding the formatting of finished intelligence products;section 3024(f)(1) of this title1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: B
children.text: the proper use of classification markings, including portion markings that indicate the classification of portions of information; and

children.label: C
children.text: any incentives and penalties related to the proper classification of intelligence information; and

children.label: A
children.text: obtaining original classification authority or derivatively classifying information; and

children.heading: Relationship to other programs
children.label: b Relationship to other programs
children.text: The head of each Executive agency shall ensure that the training required by subsection (a) is conducted efficiently and in conjunction with any other required security, intelligence, or other training programs to reduce the costs and administrative burdens associated with carrying out the training required by subsection (a).
